meaning: n. 乳儿,乳臭未干的小子,还在吃母奶的婴儿或幼兽
examples: A young woman suckling a baby is one of life's most natural and delightful scenes.
Roast suckling pig is the most famous speciality of Cantonese food.
The famous specialities of these two are roast suckling pig and roast Beijing duck.
If you are in town on Sunday, go for the four-course pre-fixe dinner that includes roasted suckling pig.
Suckling is running with the ball he helped create and, in theory, prospering well.
